case_title: LEE, EDWIN vs. SIMS, JONI et al

docket_entries.description: CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
CLAIMS OF EXEMPTION/ENFORCEMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, EDWIN

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, CALENDAR OF MAR-10-1994 THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE 50%OF THE CURRENT EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUGMT DEBTR. ALSO, TO RELEASE 50% OF THE CURRENT EARNINGS HELD TO JUDGMNT CREDITOR FOR PAY ON THE JUDGMNT, EXCEPT FOR $175.00 TO BE WITHHELD FROM PAY EACH MONTH.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIMS, JONI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1230 BROADWAY ST, #4, S.F, CA. $3,200.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,200.00, DEF. TO MAKE INSTALLMENTS - $400 BY 12-1-93 & $200 STARTING 1-1-94 & EACH SUCCEEDING MONTH. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SIMS, JONI
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
